texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: In addition to FULLBOARD services, the following additional services are provided:
texts.text: In addition to FULLBOARD services, the following additional services are provided:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All local soft drinks, soda water, local still water, sparkling water, local bottled beer (Tusker, Pilsner, Balozi), South African house wines (red and white) at restaurants and bars. New from 01.11.24: afternoon snack menu at the Pool Bistro/Pizzeria from 13h00-18h00.
texts.text: All local soft drinks, soda water, local still water, sparkling water, local bottled beer (Tusker, Pilsner, Balozi), South African house wines (red and white) at restaurants and bars. New from 01.11.24: afternoon snack menu at the Pool Bistro/Pizzeria from 13h00-18h00.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Local brands of spirits for drinks and cocktails at the bars (10h00 - 23h00). Daily filling of the minibar with soft drinks and beer
texts.text: Local brands of spirits for drinks and cocktails at the bars (10h00 - 23h00). Daily filling of the minibar with soft drinks and beer

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Per every 7 nights of stay: 1 á la carte dinner in restaurants Chui Grill or Lemongrass included (Lobster & Prawns are excluded)
texts.text: Per every 7 nights of stay: 1 á la carte dinner in restaurants Chui Grill or Lemongrass included (Lobster & Prawns are excluded)
